newContent: Remote OK Senior Fraud Risk Analyst Braviant Holdings <p>At Braviant, we believe in hiring great talent and offering them the flexibility to achieve great results unbounded by geography. Braviant is offering a fully remote option for anyone in the U.S. who wants to join our team and help us grow. <span style="font-size: 16px;">W</span>e also have an office space in the heart of downtown Chicago for those who prefer to get out of the house and collaborate with some colleagues in person.</p><p><br></p><p><b style="font-size: 18px;">Who we are:</b></p><p>Braviant is a leading provider of tech-enabled credit products that combines breakthrough technology and cutting-edge machine learning to transform how people access credit online. &nbsp;Our next-generation approach to lending reduces credit barriers and creates a Path to Prime to help millions of underbanked consumers build credit history, reduce their cost of borrowing, and take control of their personal finances. Braviant has been named multiple times to the Inc. 5000 list of fastest growing private companies and has been recognized as a Best Place to Work by Crainâs Chicago, BuiltIn Chicago and American Banker.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p></p><div style="border: none; border-bottom: solid #2E75B6 1.0pt; padding: 0in 0in 4.0pt 0in;"><p style="margin: 14pt 0in 6pt; border-image: initial; padding: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; border: medium none currentcolor;"><strong><span style="font-size: 12.0pt; color: #1f4e79;">POSITION SUMMARY</span></strong></p><p></p><p style="margin: 0in 0in 6pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"><span style="color: #595959;">We are building and scaling a high-performance consumer lending platform and are looking for a Fraud Risk Analyst to help protect the business from identity fraud, first-party fraud, and credit abuse.</span></p><p style="margin: 0in 0in 6pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"><span style="color: #595959;">This role sits at the intersection of fraud, credit, and analytics, and will directly impact early loss performance and portfolio quality.</span></p><p style="margin: 0in 0in 6pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"><span style="color: #595959;">You will be responsible for identifying fraud patterns, building detection strategies, and implementing controls that prevent bad actors from entering the portfolio.</span></p><p style="margin: 0in 0in 6pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"><span style="color: #595959;">This is a hands-on, high-impact role suited for someone who is analytical, detail-oriented, and biased toward action, not just case review.</span></p><p style="margin: 0in 0in 6pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"><span style="color: #595959;">You will work closely with Credit, Product, Operations and Engineering to ensure fraud risk is properly identified and separated from credit risk in decisioning.</span></p><p style="margin: 0in 0in 6pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"><span style="color: #595959;">This role is Addison, TX-based with a 4-day in-office requirement. </span></p><div style="border: none; border-bottom: solid #2E75B6 1.0pt; padding: 0in 0in 4.0pt 0in;"><p style="margin: 14pt 0in 6pt; border-image: initial; padding: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; border: medium none currentcolor;"><strong><span style="font-size: 12.0pt; color: #1f4e79;">WHAT YOUâLL BE DOING</span></strong></p><p></p><ul style="margin-top: 0in; margin-bottom: 3.0pt;"><li style="margin: 0in 0in 3pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"><span style="color: #595959;">Analyze application and early performance data to identify fraud patterns, including synthetic identity, first-party fraud, and credit abuse.</span></li><li style="margin: 0in 0in 3pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"><span style="color: #595959;">Develop and implement fraud detection strategies, including rules, thresholds, and decisioning logic.</span></li><li style="margin: 0in 0in 3pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"><span style="color: #595959;">Monitor early performance (e.g., FPD, zero-pay accounts) to identify potential fraud-driven losses.</span></li><li style="margin: 0in 0in 3pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"><span style="color: #595959;">Distinguish fraud risk vs credit risk, improving approval quality and reducing early loss.</span></li><li style="margin: 0in 0in 3pt 0px;
